summary_en: 1,800,000 shares (2.9% of outstanding) authorized for acquisition at ¥2.0B upper limit via open-market purchase on Tokyo Exchange, Jun 1, 2026–Mar 31, 2027. Rationale: optimal capital structure and shareholder return enhancement under mid-term plan 2026–2028.
title_en: Notice Regarding Decision on Matters Related to Acquisition of Treasury Shares
translation_en_brief: Japan Transcity Corporation resolved on May 29, 2026 to acquire its own shares under article 156 of the Companies Act (as applied via article 165(3)). The company will purchase up to 1,800,000 ordinary shares (2.9% of issued shares excluding treasury stock) for an aggregate maximum of ¥2.0 billion via open-market purchase on the Tokyo Exchange. The acquisition period runs from June 1, 2026 to March 31, 2027. The rationale is to enhance shareholder returns as part of executing the optimal capital structure target outlined in the medium-term management plan 2026–2028, which was announced on May 14, 2026. As of April 30, 2026, the company held 4,541,483 treasury shares against 61,864,034 issued shares (excluding treasury stock).
